name: clinic-api
description: Clinic Management SaaS — Express + Mongoose backend (multi-tenant). Phase 0 foundation.
//optionalDependencies: Driver/provider SDKs that are lazy-require()d only when the matching driver is selected (PAYMENTS_DRIVER=razorpay, STORAGE_DRIVER=s3|cloudinary, AI_DRIVER=anthropic). They are OPTIONAL so a lean dev box that uses mock/local drivers isn't forced to install them, but a normal `npm install` DOES pull them in so production drivers work out of the box (previously they were absent from package.json, so switching to a real driver crashed with MODULE_NOT_FOUND).
